---
title: "NotebookLM — account-1 — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Descriptive catalog of parser v3 parquets (account-1 only, en)"
source-title: "NotebookLM account-1"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, DuckDB connection, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "notebooklm"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "NotebookLM (account-1)"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#F4B400"  # Google yellow/orange
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "NotebookLM"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = ["sources", "notes", "outputs", "guide_questions", "source_guides"]
ACCOUNT_FILTER = "1"

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **NotebookLM account-1** (`hello.marlonlemes`, en). Filtered view of the
> consolidated folder. For the 3-account view: [`notebooklm.qmd`](notebooklm.html).
> account-2: [`notebooklm-acc-2.qmd`](notebooklm-acc-2.html). legacy:
> [`notebooklm-legacy.qmd`](notebooklm-legacy.html).

{{< include _template.qmd >}}

{{< include _template_aux.qmd >}}
